title: Skill-SE-Kit Run Result
description: Return value of skill-se-kit run (CLI) or runtime.run_integrated_skill() (Python API).

kit_active.description: Whether the kit was active for this execution. False when runtime_mode is 'off'.

runtime_mode.description: The resolved runtime mode for this execution.

execution_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution. Present when kit_active is true.

task_signature.description: Normalized task signature used for retrieval and matching.

retrieved.description: Skills and experiences retrieved for this execution context.

result.description: The executor's raw return value. Structure depends on the executor implementation.

autonomous_cycle.description: Present when runtime_mode is 'auto' and feedback was available. Contains the learning cycle outcome.

action.description: What the engine decided to do with the feedback.

proposal.description: The generated proposal, or null if decision was discard/skip.

evaluation.description: Evaluation receipt, or null if no proposal was generated.

promotion.description: Promotion result, or null if evaluation failed or no proposal.

evolution_report.description: Human-readable evolution report, present when human_reports is enabled.

skill_entry.description: A single entry in the skill bank (local/skill_bank/skills.json).

skill_entry_id.description: Unique identifier for this skill entry.

content.description: The skill content, typically a bulleted list of learned guidelines.

version.description: Semantic version of this skill entry, bumped on each update.

task_signature.description: Normalized task signature this skill was learned from.

source_experience_ids.description: Experience IDs that contributed to this skill.
